title: Only Hammer
description: Only Hammer mod is a mod which adds hammers which mine 3x3
body:
# ![Only Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399cbeb4280efb1916d744cb5a5e0672a1b697ea.gif) Only Hammer ![Only Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399cbeb4280efb1916d744cb5a5e0672a1b697ea.gif)

Only Hammer adds crafteable useful hammers which are pickaxes that mine in a 3x3 area, from wooden hammer till netherite hammer in a vanilla experience, which makes easier go to the mines, flatten a mountain or delete a chunk, anything that you come up with.

## ![Only Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399cbeb4280efb1916d744cb5a5e0672a1b697ea.gif) Hammers Stats:

![Hammers Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/084b9537bd8dfc8e6654a109af93c287620fd733.png)

![Stone Hammer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd38d5f6144b7b132c6b81b3cb38ac4d69ca6f09.png)

### Changelog:

3.0.0 Version adds a creative tab, spanish language and changes a little all hammer textures

2.5.0 Version changes slightly some textures, adds two new achievments and changes another two

2.0.0 Version adds Two new Hammers, Wooden and Stone ones

1.5.0 Version adds achievments and change sightly the textures
